entities.description: As a subsection of 'Other Design Considerations', this section discusses the retention of the Micro SD card interface, which is a hardware design detail relevant to the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the physical interface for connecting a Micro SD card, which is discussed as a design consideration in section 5.2.1.

relations.description: The concept of 'Micro SD卡接口' is a primary topic of section 5.2.1.
